testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Nutrition products using Price and Brand filters", "Validating price and brand by filter functionality"](1)

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Add to Cart functionality and pricing for a Nutrition product", "Validate Add to Cart functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser navigates to the cart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep.user_navigates_to_the_cart()&amp#27;[0m 17:33:23.853 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Validate correct item is added &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser increases the quantity to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"3"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep.user_increases_the_quantity_to(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 17:33:29.185 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Validate correct item is added 17:33:29.234 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Expected Cart Count : 4 17:33:29.237 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Actual Cart Count : 4 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe cart should display correct quantity&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep.the_cart_should_display_correct_quantity()&amp#27;[0m 17:33:34.246 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Validate correct item is added 17:33:34.248 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Expected Selling Price : 276 17:33:34.248 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Expected Total Price : 396 17:33:34.248 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Expected Discount : 120 17:33:34.300 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Actual Selling Price : 276 17:33:34.322 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Actual Total Price : 396 17:33:34.348 [TestNG-PoolService-0] INFO stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep - Actual Discount : 120 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mThe cart should display the correct selling price, MRP, discount and total price&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AddToCartStep.validate_selling_price_discount_mrp()&amp#27;[0m
